---
name: Lesson proposal
about: Propose a new lesson, exercise, or learning module
title: "lesson: "
labels: ["curriculum", "needs-triage", "SSOC"]
assignees: ''

---

## Lesson Title

Proposed lesson name.

## Audience Level

- [ ] Beginner
- [ ] Intermediate
- [ ] Advanced

## Why This Lesson Matters

What gap in the curriculum does this fill?

## Learning Objectives

List 2-5 clear outcomes.

## Proposed Exercises

For each exercise include:
- prompt
- expected command or expected output
- points

## Placement In Track

Where should this lesson appear (before/after existing slugs)?

## Links / References

Any external docs or examples.
